basics.name: Basics
basics.description: Wormhole's architecture, security, and core components to help understand how the protocol works.

ntt.name: NTT
ntt.description: All NTT docs, including architecture, deployment guides, CLI usage, and configuration for EVM and Solana.

connect.name: Connect
connect.description: Setup, features, and configuration details for integrating the Connect widget into your dApp.

wtt.name: WTT
wtt.description: Architecture overview, transfer flows, and smart contract methods for cross-chain token transfers using WTT.

settlement.name: Settlement
settlement.description: Architecture, integration guides, and setup instructions for building on the Wormhole Settlement protocol.

executor.name: Executor
executor.description: Guides and reference for using the Executor shared execution framework to deliver Wormhole messages across chains.

multigov.name: MultiGov
multigov.description: Architecture, deployment steps, and upgrade instructions for multichain governance on EVM and Solana.

queries.name: Queries
queries.description: Guides for using the Wormhole Query SDK and Proxy to construct, test, and verify on-chain data queries across chains.

transfer.name: Transfer
transfer.description: Comprehensive documentation for Wormhole transfer products.

typescript-sdk.name: TypeScript SDK
typescript-sdk.description: Docs for working with VAAs, payloads, and cross-chain message structures using the TypeScript SDK.

solidity-sdk.name: Solidity SDK
solidity-sdk.description: Docs for integrating Wormhole in Solidity, including contract interfaces, examples, and cross-chain messaging patterns.

cctp.name: CCTP
cctp.description: Guides and reference for sending USDC across chains using Circle's CCTP and the Wormhole messaging protocol.

reference.name: Reference
reference.description: Reference details such as chain IDs, contract addresses, and finality levels.
